hero.name: Oleksandr Holyshevskyi
hero.tagline: Ensuring software quality with 7+ years of expertise in test automation, specializing in Playwright, Selenium, C#, and TypeScript.
hero.description: As a dedicated QA Engineer, I am passionate about leveraging technology to deliver exceptional results for my clients. My expertise lies in designing, developing, and executing automated tests to ensure the highest standards of software quality. My commitment to excellence is evident in my work, where I strive to enhance user experiences through meticulous testing and continuous improvement. I bring unwavering energy and a collaborative spirit to every project, making me a reliable and valuable asset to any team. By focusing on precision and efficiency, I help organizations achieve their goals and deliver outstanding products.

aboutSection.heading: About Me
aboutSection.summary: As a dedicated Senior QA Engineer with over 7 years of experience, I am passionate about leveraging technology to deliver exceptional results. My expertise lies in designing, developing, and executing automated tests using Playwright, Selenium, C#, and TypeScript to ensure the highest standards of software quality. I bring unwavering energy and a collaborative spirit to every project, mentoring junior engineers and contributing to team success through technical expertise and attention to detail.

NDAJob.description: Specializing in Integration, Verification, Validation, and Qualification (IVVQ) processes for desktop products. Managing the IVVQ team and defining the test strategy of the solution. Leading the development and execution of test strategies, test cases, and automation frameworks tailored to desktop applications. Collaborating with cross-functional teams to identify, analyze, and resolve defects during early development phases. Driving continuous improvements in QA methodologies and processes.

AdvantISSJob.description: Specializing in C# and TypeScript to create automated test scripts using Playwright and Selenium libraries. Building customized test frameworks tailored to project needs. Mentoring junior team members, sharing knowledge and ensuring high-quality results. Excelling in test case design and execution, contributing to project success through technical expertise and attention to detail.

PasynSoftJob.description: Extensive experience on web application projects with strong proficiency in C# and TypeScript for writing automated tests. Expert in Selenium and Playwright library, creating comprehensive test suites. Proficient in JavaScript, Node.js, SQL, Git, and Azure DevOps, effectively integrating tests into larger development workflows.

TechStudioJob.description: QA Engineer on the IPTV project for mobile platforms iOS and Android. Created test cases and testing artifacts, responsible for testing both frontend and backend. Started developing automated tests for the API using C#. Mentored newcomers in the team, contributing to the growth and success of the company.

ohBlog.description: A personal portfolio and blog platform built with Next.js, featuring MDX blog posts, multi-language support (EN/UK/CZ), dark mode, and a modern responsive design.

folderSync.description: A C# utility for synchronizing folders efficiently. Handles file comparison, copying, and deletion to keep directories in sync.

clariSpend.description: A React Native expense tracking mobile application built with Expo and TypeScript for managing personal finances on the go.

3rd.name: Andrii Yermakov
3rd.text: I am delighted to provide a strong recommendation for Oleksandr as a mentor in manual and automated testing. He showcased exemplary proficiency, dedication, and a deep understanding of testing methodologies. His comprehensive grasp of testing techniques, effective communication, and commendable prowess in test automation make him an exceptional mentor. His sincere commitment to professional advancement of mentees and strong problem-solving acumen are truly noteworthy.

1st.name: Denys Hannych
1st.position: Denys worked with me on the same team
1st.text: Sasha is a dedicated and highly skilled professional in automated testing. His expertise in creating and executing test scripts has been instrumental in improving our software development processes. His attention to detail, problem-solving abilities, and proactive identification of critical defects are truly commendable. Beyond technical skills, he is an excellent team player and communicator who significantly improved the overall quality of our projects.

2nd.name: Yana Kyrychenko
2nd.text: Alex is highly skilled as a QA and eager to learn new areas and acquire new tools. He's good at keeping the product on the decent level and is really meticulous to detail, which is essential for a QA professional.

contactSection.heading: Get in Touch
contactSection.subtitle: Let's Connect
contactSection.description: I'm always open to discussing new projects, opportunities, or collaborations in QA and test automation. Feel free to reach out!

footer.tagline: Senior QA Engineer based in Prague, Czech Republic

homePage.name: Hi, my name is Oleksandr Holyshevskyi
homePage.about: I'm a certificated Test Automation Engineer based in Ukraine. I am dedicated to improving the experiences of both people and customers alike, using my skills to deliver top-notch results that drive success.

about.title: bout
about.aboutMe: As a Test Automation Engineer I possess a strong passion for both technology and serving my clients. My unwavering energy and dedication to ensuring the best experience for my customers is reflected in my work as a skilled professional who designs, develops and executes automated tests to enhance software quality. With a focus on delivering top-notch results, I am a valuable asset to any team.

TechStudioJob.occupation: As a QA Engineer on the IPTV project for mobile platforms iOS and Android, I have honed my skills in quality assurance and testing. I have created test cases and other testing artifacts, and have been responsible for testing both the frontend and backend of the application. Additionally, I have taken steps to improve the efficiency of our testing processes by starting to develop automated tests for the API using C#. My experience in this role has also allowed me to share my knowledge and mentor newcomers in the team, contributing to the growth and success of the company.

PasynSoftJob.occupation: Extensive experience on web application projects, I bring a strong technical knowledge to the table. My proficiency in using C# and TypeScript for writing automated tests has allowed me to effectively test and validate software functionality. Additionally, my experience with Selenium and the Playwright library has equipped me with the tools and skills necessary to create comprehensive test suites and ensure the highest level of software quality. In addition to my strong skills in C# and TypeScript, I am also well-versed in a range of other technologies, including JavaScript, NodeJS, SQL, Git, and Azure DevOps. These technical proficiencies have allowed me to effectively design, develop, and execute automated tests for web applications, and have equipped me with the ability to integrate my tests into a larger development workflow.

AdvantISSJob.occupation: As a Test Automation Engineer, I specialize in C# and TypeScript to create automated test scripts using Playwright and Selenium libraries. My strengths include building customized test frameworks tailored to project needs. I've worked on diverse projects, gaining adaptability and in-depth knowledge of software development processes. Additionally, I've mentored junior team members, sharing knowledge and ensuring high-quality results. I excel in essential tasks such as test case design and execution, contributing to project success through technical expertise and attention to detail.
